overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins featuring a hooded protagonist exploring an ancient Egyptian desert outpost. The character walks through mud-brick structures and wooden scaffolding before traversing open desert canyons toward a distant fortress settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient outpost with wooden scaffolding and stone gatehouse

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the outpost past wooden scaffolding and mud-brick structures

entered.detail: rustic wooden support beams and planks attached to mud-brick building
ancient stone archway with crenellated top and rectangular opening
black wooden stand holding multiple arrows with red banding
tan-colored adobe structure with small windows

segments.scene_description: The protagonist walks through an ancient desert outpost, passing wooden scaffolding on the left and approaching a stone gatehouse. The environment features mud-brick architecture and scattered hay bales under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortress wall walkway with canyon overlook

events.description: character ascends to elevated fortress wall with stone crenellations and canyon view

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated fortress wall overlooking the canyon valley below

entered.detail: stone battlements with alternating high and low sections along the wall edge
deep rocky canyon with steep cliffs and sparse vegetation below
metal fire pit emitting smoke and flames near the wall edge
two-story stone watchtower with arched openings and crenellated roof

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated fortress wall with stone crenellations, overlooking a vast canyon valley. A smoking brazier burns near the wall edge as the character approaches a stone watchtower.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert transition zone with haystacks and training equipment

events.description: descends from fortress wall into open desert area with haystacks and scattered debris

agents.ego_description: walking through the outpost outskirts past haystacks and wooden carts toward open desert

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing near haystacks facing away from camera

entered.detail: large mound of dried hay with wooden frame support
rusted wooden wagon with metal wheels partially filled with debris
circular archery target with concentric rings mounted on wooden stand
tall red sandstone rock formations rising from the desert floor

segments.scene_description: Leaving the fortress wall, the character enters an open area with haystacks and a wooden cart. A distant NPC stands near the haystacks as the landscape opens to reveal large red rock buttes in the distance.

events.description: enters narrow canyon with tall rock walls on both sides
ancient fortress settlement becomes visible through the canyon opening ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the winding canyon toward the distant fortress settlement

entered.detail: tall red sandstone cliff faces with layered rock strata
tall red sandstone cliff faces casting shadows on the path
large stone settlement with multiple buildings and defensive walls
rock formation creating natural archway frame in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow desert canyon with towering red rock walls on both sides. As the canyon opens, an ancient fortress settlement becomes visible in the distance, framed by a natural stone arch against the mountainous backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the enclosed mud-brick structures of a desert outpost into the vast, open expanse of a red rock canyon. It begins by following the protagonist past wooden scaffolding and hay bales toward a stone gatehouse under a partly cloudy sky. As the character ascends, the scene shifts to an elevated fortress wall where a smoking brazier burns, overlooking a deep canyon valley before approaching a stone watchtower. The camera then moves away from the fortifications into an open area with a wooden cart and haystacks, where the horizon expands to reveal towering red rock buttes. Finally, the path leads through a narrow canyon with soaring red walls that gradually opens to reveal a distant fortress settlement framed by a natural stone arch against a mountainous backdrop.
